title: muscari neglectum var. fontqueri
intro: Muscari neglectum var. fontqueri, also known as the Spanish muscari, is a flowering plant species in the family Asparagaceae. It is a type of bluebell, characterized by its bell-shaped, blue-purple flowers and grass-like foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The roots and flowers of the Spanish muscari can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures, to alleviate respiratory issues and support overall health.
